title: tuwach #2902
definition:
1) to spread over, overlay, plaster, cover over, coat, besmear
    1a) (Qal) to overspread, coat, overlay
    1b) (Niphal) to be coated, be plastered
 2) (Qal) to be besmeared
nasbUsage:

 2) (Qal) to be besmeared

    NASB:  to overspread, overlay, coat, besmear
